name: BACARDÍ Carta Negra
title: BACARDÍ Black Rum | Black Rum| Medium-bodied Dark Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum is a medium-bodied black rum, crafted with passion by the Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ.
marketing_description: Some might call it black magic. Create intense experiences with BACARDÍ Carta Negra in your glass. Spice it up or keep it neat, any combination will be one to savour.
tasting_notes: A journey that begins with sweet, tropical fruit, buttery caramel and vanilla notes and ends with a smoky liquorice and molasses finish.
process: Expertly blended by the Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ, BACARDÍ Carta Negra's rich, dark flavours develop in heavily charred oak barrels.
how_to_serve: Spice it up or keep it neat, any combination will be one to savour.

faq_items.question: What is dark rum?
faq_items.answer: Dark rum can be found black, brown and red in appearance and is usually, but not always, aged longer than gold or white rum. It often indicates a more intense flavour profile, and is also delicious when used in cooking.

faq_items.question: What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Colour can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But colour can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself.

faq_items.question: How do you make rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
